project.objective: Determine when and where Elijah Wilkins (b. c.1814, Muhlenberg County, Kentucky) died

questions.question: When and where did Elijah Wilkins (b. c.1814, Muhlenberg County, Kentucky) die?
questions.rationale: Primary objective. Census trail ends after 1870; no Kentucky death certificate is expected (statewide registration began 1911), so the county estate administration is the key evidence.

items.rationale: Check the Kentucky statewide death collections for a certificate.
With no certificate expected pre-1911, the estate administration brackets the death.

log.notes: No death certificate for the subject in the Kentucky statewide death collections. Kentucky statewide death registration began 1911; the subject (last documented 1870, born c.1814) died decades earlier, so NO Kentucky death certificate exists for him. This is a documented negative, not an unsearched gap.

Muhlenberg County estate administration: Jesse Wilkins named administrator of the estate of Elijah Wilkins, deceased, intestate (1885 term). Establishes the subject was deceased by 1885. No exact death date stated in the index.

sources.citation: Muhlenberg County, Kentucky, Court Order Books, administration of the estate of Elijah Wilkins, deceased, intestate, Jesse Wilkins administrator, 1885 term; digital images, FamilySearch.org.
sources.notes: Full-text index of the order-book page; original order book not separately imaged in this search.

assertions.informant: County court clerk recording the administration grant
assertions.informant_bias_notes: The administration record establishes the subject was dead by the 1885 term but does not state a death date; the death is bracketed, not dated. Indirect evidence of death timing.
Name of the decedent as recorded in the administration grant.

assertions.value: Jesse Wilkins, administrator of Elijah Wilkins's estate
assertions.informant_bias_notes: Jesse Wilkins (the subject's documented son) served as administrator — the kin relationship anchors the decedent's identity to the subject.

person_evidence.rationale: The intestate estate administered in 1885 Muhlenberg County, with the subject's documented son Jesse as administrator, is the subject's estate — bracketing his death to before 1885.
Jesse-as-administrator ties the estate to the subject via the documented father-son relationship.

hypotheses.claim: Elijah Wilkins died after the 1870 census and before the 1885 estate administration, in Muhlenberg County, Kentucky; no death certificate exists (statewide registration began 1911).
hypotheses.notes: Bounded conclusion: alive at the 1870 census, deceased by the 1885 administration. Exact date not recoverable from surviving records; the documented negative (no KY certificate pre-1911) is part of the answer.
